en.name: Bridges
en.description: Bridges (Hashiwokakero) is a connecting puzzle where you build a network of bridges between islands. Each island displays a number indicating how many bridges must connect to it. Bridges run horizontally or vertically, can be single or double, and never cross. All islands must be connected into a single network. A satisfying test of spatial planning!
en.objectives: Connect all islands with bridges so that each island has the correct number of bridge connections, no bridges cross each other, and all islands form one connected network.
en.howToPlay: Click between islands to build bridges (1-2 bridges per connection). Each island's number shows required bridge connections. Bridges run horizontally/vertically and cannot cross. All islands must connect.

rules.controls: Click between two islands to add a bridge. Click again to add a second bridge (double). Click a third time to remove all bridges.
mechanics: Each island number indicates how many bridges connect to it
Bridges run horizontally or vertically only
Maximum of 2 bridges can connect any pair of islands
All islands must be connected in a single network

tips: Islands with 8 need 4 bridges in each direction
Corner 4s need 2 bridges in each available direction
Plan routes to avoid bridge crossings
All islands must be connected in one network

faq.question: What does the number on each island mean?
faq.answer: The number tells you exactly how many bridges must connect to that island. A 4 means four total bridge connections (which could be two double bridges or four single bridges).

faq.question: Can bridges cross each other?
faq.answer: No, bridges can never cross or overlap. You'll need to plan alternative routes when islands block direct connections.

faq.question: Do all islands need to connect to each other?
faq.answer: Yes! All islands must be reachable from any other island through the bridge network. No isolated groups allowed.

faq.question: What's the maximum bridges between two islands?
faq.answer: You can place up to 2 bridges (a double bridge) between any pair of islands that can be connected horizontally or vertically.

zh.name: 造桥
zh.description: 造桥（桥を架ける）是一个连接谜题，在岛屿之间建造桥梁网络。每个岛屿显示一个数字，表示必须连接到它的桥数。桥梁水平或垂直延伸，可以是单桥或双桥，永不交叉。所有岛屿必须连接成一个单一网络。空间规划的满足测试！
zh.objectives: 用桥梁连接所有岛屿，使每个岛屿有正确数量的桥连接，没有桥梁相互交叉，所有岛屿形成一个连通的网络。
zh.howToPlay: 点击岛屿之间的格子来画桥。可以在两个岛之间画一到两座桥。所有岛屿必须连通。单个岛屿不能有超过两座桥连接到另一个岛屿。

rules.controls: 点击两个岛屿之间添加桥梁。再次点击添加第二座桥（双桥）。第三次点击移除所有桥梁。
mechanics: 每个岛屿数字表示连接到它的桥梁数量
桥梁只能水平或垂直延伸
任何一对岛屿最多可连接2座桥
桥梁不能与其他桥梁交叉
所有岛屿必须连接成一个单一网络

tips: 从角上的1开始——它们只有一种选择
不能有超过两座桥的任何连接
确保所有岛屿最终连通
使用排除法找到必要的桥梁

faq.question: 每个岛屿上的数字是什么意思？
faq.answer: 数字告诉你必须连接到该岛屿的桥数。4意味着总共四座桥连接（可以是两座双桥或四座单桥）。

faq.question: 桥梁可以交叉吗？
faq.answer: 不可以，桥梁永远不能交叉或重叠。当岛屿阻挡直接连接时，你需要规划替代路线。
